service_status.description: The current status of the service.

instance_id.description: ID of the service instance (this is the index of the service instance starting from 0).

instance_status.description: The current status of the service instance.

image_name.description: Image name used to create the service container.

image_digest.description: The unique and immutable identifier representing the image content.

restart_count.description: Number of times Snowflake restarted the service.

start_time.description: Date and time when the container started.
